2. Gemini - 8/10 - Geminis are adaptable and quick-witted, making them well-suited for $LINE's fast-paced environment.
3. Cancer - 6/10 - Cancers can be moody and emotional, which may affect their ability to respond quickly in a trading scenario.
4. Leo - 9/10 - Leos are confident and charismatic, often exceling at reading market sentiment and making bold moves.
5. Virgo - 8/10 - Virgos are analytical and detail-oriented, making them strong researchers and traders.
6. Libra - 7/10 - Librans can be indecisive, but their fairness and balance-seeking nature helps them navigate complex market scenarios.
7. Scorpio - 9/10 - Scorpios are intense and passionate about trading, often displaying a deep understanding of market dynamics.
8. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Sagittarians are optimistic and open-minded, which can help them take calculated risks in the markets.
9. Capricorn - 7/10 - Capricorns can be disciplined and patient, but may struggle with impulsiveness or over-trading.
10. Aquarius - 8/10 - Aquarians are innovative and humanitarian, often bringing a unique perspective to trading and market analysis.
11. Pisces - 6/10 - Pisces can be dreamy and emotional, which may impact their ability to make objective trading decisions.
Please note that these scores are based on general astrological characteristics and should not be taken as an absolute prediction of individual performance in $LINE or any other context.
